name: loop-kit
description: Self-verifying build loop for Claude Code. Freeze YES/NO criteria (sha256-pinned, per-run dir), then implement -> L0 deterministic gate (test/lint/typecheck) -> checker ladder (loop-verify cross-vendor when available, bundled validator otherwise; builder != checker) -> bounded iterate with an honest stop. Grounds the loop in external verification instead of lenient self-grading.
